ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership tier */,
  "membership_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership tier */,
  "monthly_price" REAL /* Monthly price for the membership */,
  "yearly_price" REAL /* Yearly price for the membership */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership tier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership tier was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the membership tier (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "max_content_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of content items a member can access per month */,
  "community_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the membership includes access to community features */,
  "free_trial_period" INTEGER /* Number of days for a free trial period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is a premium feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_features" (
  "membership_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a membership and a feature */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership tier */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is included by default in the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_features_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership tier the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's subscription ends */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the user (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "preferred_content_types" TEXT /* JSON array of content types the user prefers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone for personalized notifications and newsletters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership tier being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or app used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newsletter */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the newsletter */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date when the newsletter was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the newsletter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the newsletter was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the newsletter (e.g., draft, sent, scheduled) */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Email address of the sender */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_newsletters" (
  "user_newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a user and a newsletter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has read the newsletter */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user read the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_newsletters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_newsletters_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending, failed) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has read the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user read the notification */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel used to send the notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
